Name: RESULT_EVENT_PARAM
Description: Defines result screen event behavior, including presentation type, messages, rewards, and covenant contribution changes.

Fields.Name: Presentation Type
Fields.Description: Determines the type of result screen presentation or visual effect.

Fields.Name: Message Type
Fields.Description: Defines the category of message shown on the result screen.

Fields.Name: Covenant Contribution Change
Fields.Description: Amount added or removed from covenant contribution upon completion.

Fields.Name: End Type
Fields.Description: Defines how the result event concludes (e.g., normal end, forced end, special end).

Fields.Name: Message ID
Fields.Description: Reference ID for the displayed result message.

Fields.Name: Victory Reward Item Lottery ID
Fields.Description: Item lottery ID used to determine victory rewards.

Fields.Name: Event Bonus Reward Item Lottery ID
Fields.Description: Additional reward item lottery ID used for special or live event bonuses.
